prompt: i need to build an adk 2.0 project called 'calculator_bot' that helps users do math with gemini. the bot should be able to add, subtract, multiply, divide

assertions.name: project_structure_complete
assertions.description: All required directories created with proper structure

assertions.name: calculator_tools_implemented
assertions.description: Calculator functions implemented (add, subtract, multiply, divide)

assertions.name: agent_initialization
assertions.description: Agent class properly initializes with tools

assertions.name: type_hints_present
assertions.description: Code includes type hints for functions and parameters

assertions.name: main_entry_point
assertions.description: main.py provides a working entry point
